prestazioni: Engine: 2UR-GSE (5.0L V8, 472hp stock) - Full forged internals upgrade with JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged slugs, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings to handle 800+ hp on E85. Pair with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (2.3L rotor, 10psi boost) and custom intercooler setup by CSF Racing with dual-core 1200hp capacity cores and 3.5" piping.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way, 85% lockup) with upgraded 3.909 final drive ratio in the 8-speed automatic transmission, paired with a PTT Performance Stage 3 torque converter (3,800 stall) and upgraded Raybestos Gen2 transmission internals for 600+ lb-ft torque capacity.

Suspension & Handling: Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (DFV2 dampers, 24-way compression/rebound adjustability) with custom valving for the IS 500 chassis, paired with Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section) and rear upper strut brace. Add Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm, 3-position) and poly bushings (SuperPro 62mm front control arm bushings) for razor-sharp turn-in.
estetica: Aero: Varis Japan IS 500-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber, 30mm wider front fenders, 40mm rear) with integrated canards and rear diffuser. Pair with a custom 3D-printed Lexus IS 500 front splitter (carbon fiber, 3" overhang) and a Seibon carbon fiber trunk with integrated duckbill spoiler (1.5" height).

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 19x9.5 +22 front / 19x11 +30 rear (ET22/ET30) with custom IS 500-specific offsets, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Suspension lowered via Ohlins coilovers (-35mm front, -30mm rear) with custom camber plates (-3.5° front, -2.8° rear).

Exterior & Lighting: Full Respray in Lexus-exclusive 'Manganese Luster' (matte metallic) with 3M Matte Black roof wrap. Replace headlights with Morimoto 2Stroke 3.0 LED projectors (5,000K, adaptive) and add Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights. Rear features a custom titanium exhaust tip setup by Agency Power (dual 4.5" quad-exit, titanium burn marks).
